name: The World of Moriea [UPDATE 1.2]
description:
There are two continents in Moriea. Idra to the East while Alra to the West as they are separated by the Majai Ocean in the center. The technology in Moriea in the 1900s is based around ww1, the 1920s is based around the interwar period (1930-1938) while the 1950s and the 1960s is based around 1990s to the modern day technology due to an technological event called the Great Leap.

In Alra:
Zenisian Empire - It is an empire in Western Alran with the Majai Ocean in the west. The Kingdom of Montania in the north, the Republic of Swadia, Battania, Aquil Republique and Republic of Montae in the East, and the Svean Tribes and the Kingdom of Montassoria in the south. It's capital is Camsila and it is the first empire in the 20th century ruled by Empress Ria under the House of Manika (They are based around the French). Svean Tribes - It is a Federation of Tribes United against Zenisian Aggression. It is situated in Southern Alra with the Zenisian Empire in the north, Kingdom of Montassoria in the South, and Aquil Republique in the East. It's capital is Linue and it's is ruled as a Federation with a council to decide it's plans (They are based around the Swedes) Kingdom of Montassora - It is a Kingdom situated in Southern Alra with the Southern Ocean to the south, the Republic of Montae to the East, and the Svean Tribes to the North. It is ruled under Emperor Wihem II by the house of the Palavis with his wife Empress Vey. It's capital is Montassora City (It is based around the Austrians) Republic of Montae - It is a Republic Situated in South East Alra. With the Nihil Ocean to the East, Zenisian Empire to the West, Aquil Republique in the North, and Kingdom of Montassora to the south west. It's capital is Monraw and is Governed by President Vue (It is based around Northern Italy) Aquil Republique - It is a Republic Situated in Eastern Alra. With the Nihil Ocean to the East, The Republic of Battania to the North, the Republic of Montae in the south and the Zenisian Empire in the West. It's capital is Rine and Governed under President Jaro (It is based around the USA but with cultures from Central to Southern Italy) Republic of Swadia - It is a Republic Situated in Eastern Alra. With the Nihil Ocean in the East, the Republic of Battania to the south, the Kingdom of Montania in the West, Zenisian Empire in the south west and the Northern Nihil Ocean to the North. It's capital is Praven and is Governed by President Blieaf (It is based around Belgium) Republic of Battania: It is a Republic Situated in Eastern Alra. With the Nihil Ocean to the East, Zenisian Empire to the West, Republic of Swadia to the North, Aquil Republique to the south. It's capital is Davai and is Governed by President Valiko (It is based around Hungary) Kingdom of Montania: It is an Empire situated in Northern Alra with the Northern Nihil Ocean in the north, Republic of Swadia to the East, and the Zenisian Empire in the south. It is ruled under King Vincent Van Aie by the house of Aie-Monau-Var. It's capital is Bliefta (It is based around the Netherlands)

In Idra:
Kingdom Of Luciania: It is a kingdom situated in Eastern Idra. With the Majai in the East, The Sybrisan Republic to the West, and the Kingdom of Mandaya to the South. It is ruled under Emperor Eike IV by the House of Aarden. It's capital is Oilvara (It is based around The German Empire) Kingdom of Mandaya: It is a kingdom situated in Eastern Idra. With the Majai to the East, the Kingdom of Moscava to the West, and the Kingdom of Luciania to the North. It is ruled under King Julian by the House of Cavaia. It's capital is Vabrai (It is based around the British) Kingdom of Moscava: It is a kingdom situated in Southern Idra, With the Kingdom of Mandaya to the East, The Nihil to the West, and The Kingdom of Ninya and the Sybrisan Republic to the North. it is ruled under Tsar Ivano II by the house of Mosva.
